    • FAQs

    Who We Are

    Governance and Values


    Giving by Walmart is overseen by a committee of Walmart executives selected for their experience and expertise, in consultation with the Nominating and Governance Committee, a subset of Walmart's majority independent board. The committee plays a role in the oversight of Walmart's social, community and sustainability initiatives and charitable giving. Walmart giving includes the company’s donations to the Walmart Foundation, and other cash and in-kind donations. The Walmart Foundation is a separately incorporated 501(c)(3) private foundation, entirely funded by the company.

     

    Julie Gehrki is president of the Walmart Foundation and also senior vice president of philanthropy at Walmart. She leads our charitable giving efforts, which, in FY2024, totaled more than $1.7 billion in cash and in-kind support to programs that align with our global philanthropic priorities: creating economic opportunity in retail, advancing environmental sustainability and strengthening local communities.

     

    The Foundation’s financial statements are audited independently each year. 

     

    Board of Directors

     

    Kathleen McLaughlin
    Chair of the Walmart Foundation Board of Directors

    Executive Vice President and Chief Sustainability Officer, Walmart Inc.

    Doug McMillon
    President and CEO, Walmart Inc.

    Andrea Albright
    Executive Vice President, Sourcing, Walmart

    Julie Barber
    Executive Vice President and Chief Merchant, Sam’s Club

    Cristian Barrientos
    President and CEO, Walmart Chile

    Dan Bartlett

    Executive Vice President, Corporate Affairs

    Rachel Brand
    Executive Vice President of Global Governance, Chief Legal Officer and Corporate Secretary

    Cedric Clark
    Executive Vice President of Store Operations, Walmart U.S.

    Isaac Cody
    Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, Walmart International

    Kalyan Raman Krishnamurthy
    Flipkart Group CEO

    Julie Gehrki
    President, Walmart Foundation and Senior Vice President, Philanthropy, Walmart Inc.

    David Glick
    Senior Vice President of Enterprise Business Services, Global Tech

    Donna Morris
    Executive Vice President, Chief People Officer, Walmart Inc.

    John David Rainey
    Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, Walmart

    William White
    Senior Vice President and Chief Marketing Officer, Walmart U.S.

     

    Walmart Foundation Officers

     

     

    Julie Gehrki
    President, Walmart Foundation

    Jacquelyn Brigance
    Treasurer

    Bryan Del Rosario
    Secretary

    BJ Crouch
    Assistant Treasurer

     

     

    A team of Walmart associates supports both grantmaking and charitable programs funded by Walmart and the Walmart Foundation. Walmart Mexico and Flipkart also have their own charitable foundations.

     

    Walmart’s core values guide our philanthropic efforts. We’re dedicated to making a positive, lasting impact and to being fair, open and honest with grantees:

     

    Service to the Customer

    Respect for the Individual

    Strive for Excellence

    Act with Integrity

    Our Commitment to Our Grantees


    Our grantees are at the core of our work.
    Achieving results depends on many factors, including the quality of our relationships and
    forging stronger interactions with our most trusted partners - our grantees.

    Read Our Commitment
